name: Strategic Allocation of Basis Adjustments

eligibility.description: Requires a valid Section 754 election to be in effect and a triggering event (transfer or distribution) to occur.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides the rules for allocating basis increases among partnership assets. Taxpayers can use these rules to ensure basis increases are allocated to depreciable or amortizable assets rather than non-depreciable land or goodwill.
